queries.question: Provide scriptwriters and editors both of whom worked on projects with a deadline of May 10th 2021.
queries.sql:
SELECT Scriptwriters.name
FROM Projects JOIN Assignments ON Projects.ID = Assignments.ProjectID JOIN Scriptwriters ON Assignments.ScriptwriterID = Scriptwriters.ID
WHERE Projects.Deadline = "2021-05-10"
UNION
SELECT Editors.name
FROM Projects JOIN Assignments ON Projects.ID = Assignments.ProjectID JOIN Editors ON Assignments.EditorID = Editors.ID
WHERE Projects.Deadline = "2021-05-10"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?projects a :Projects .
    ?assignments a :Assignments .
    ?assignments p:hasProjects ?projects .
    ?scriptwriters a :Scriptwriters .
    ?assignments p:hasScriptwriters ?scriptwriters .
    ?scriptwriters p:name ?name .
    ?projects p:Deadline ?deadline_f .
    FILTER(STR(?deadline_f) = "2021-05-10")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?projects a :Projects .
    ?assignments a :Assignments .
    ?assignments p:hasProjects ?projects .
    ?editors a :Editors .
    ?assignments p:hasEditors ?editors .
    ?editors p:name ?name .
    ?projects p:Deadline ?deadline_f .
    FILTER(STR(?deadline_f) = "2021-05-10")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}

FROM Projects JOIN Assignments ON Projects.ID = Assignments.ProjectID JOIN Scriptwriters ON Assignments.ScriptwriterID = Scriptwriters.ID
